rfid_setup.message0: Initialize RFID reader %1 RX pin %2 TX pin %3 Enable pin %4
rfid_setup.tooltip: Initialize the RFID card reader and set the RX, TX and enable pins

rfid_on_tag_read.message0: When the RFID reader %1 reads the tag
rfid_on_tag_read.tooltip: Code executed when an RFID tag is read

rfid_available.message0: RFID card reader %1 has data to read

rfid_read_tag.message0: RFID card reader %1 reads tag ID
rfid_read_tag.tooltip: Read the ID of the RFID tag (10-digit string)
